note: Four operational gates that must pass before Day 4-7 dry-run is valid. Design is frozen — these gates verify execution integrity.

gate_1_runtime_reproducibility.description: Verify measurement stability across warm and cold llama-server states.

warm_rerun.what: Run 5 anchors against running llama-server. Already done: 5-run zero variance.

cold_start_rerun.what: Kill llama-server, restart with identical flags, run 5 anchors.
cold_start_rerun.pass_criteria: All anchor scores match warm baseline (tolerance: max_delta <= 0.02)
cold_start_rerun.if_drift_0_02_to_0_05: Log as formally known limitation. Tighten run discipline: all campaign runs must happen within a single server session.
cold_start_rerun.status: FAIL — max_delta=0.116 (B2), exceeds both pass (0.02) and abort (0.05) thresholds
cold_start_rerun.root_cause: llama-server cold start produces different KV cache initialization or CUDA scheduling state. Responses differ on keyword-boundary probes. Within a warm session: perfectly deterministic (5-run zero variance). Across sessions: up to 0.116 delta.
cold_start_rerun.operational_constraint: ALL campaign measurements must occur within a single uninterrupted llama-server session. If the server restarts for any reason, the baseline must be re-verified (run 5 anchors, check max_delta <= 0.02 vs previous session) before any campaign attempt is counted. Attempts measured across a session boundary are INVALID.
cold_start_rerun.cold_intra_session_note: B1 showed 0.100 delta between cold run 1 and cold run 2. The cold-started server is less deterministic than a warm server. This may stabilize after a warmup period. Campaign should run a 5-anchor warmup before any measurement run.

gate_1_runtime_reproducibility.overall_gate_1_verdict: CONDITIONAL PASS — warm-session measurements are perfectly deterministic. Cold-start introduces drift. Operational constraint: single-session discipline + warmup required.

gate_2_pack_builder_determinism.description: Verify that the pair-pack builder produces identical output from identical inputs.

double_build.what: Run pack builder twice with same inputs, compare output hashes.
double_build.pass_criteria: Identical pack count, membership, and SHA256 hashes.
double_build.inputs_frozen: 240 fresh + 120 historical + 40 control per pack. Source corpus, selection seed, and dedup rules frozen in pack builder script.

gate_2_pack_builder_determinism.note: The pack builder script must be committed before Gate 2 can run. It must accept a seed parameter and produce deterministic output.

gate_3_leakage_closure.description: Verify no holdout probe content appears in training packs.

preregistered_audit.what: Exact text match: no holdout probe prompt or expected answer substring appears in any pack.

informational_audit.what: Secondary, non-binding check for normalized similarity: code skeleton overlap, renamed-identifier near-duplicates, historical exemplar collision.
informational_audit.pass_criteria: Log residual risk. Does NOT gate campaign execution unless preregistered abort conditions are met.
informational_audit.note: This audit documents what 'leakage clean' does and does not mean. It does not change the campaign — it qualifies the claim.

gate_4_dry_run_stop_conditions.description: Frozen exit criteria for the 1-2 dry-run attempts (Days 4-7). Without these, dry-run becomes soft adaptation.
success_criteria: Pack manifest reproduced exactly from frozen inputs
Holdout exclusion enforced (zero holdout content in pack)
Full 60-probe eval runs to completion on child checkpoint
Critique closure emitted with correct attempt_id
Child checkpoint destroyed after closure (not promoted)
Expected metrics emitted (pre_score, post_score, delta, success boolean)
No threshold, pack, or parameter changes based on dry-run outcome
failure_handling: Infrastructure failure (OOM, timeout, disk): fix and retry. Does not count against campaign.
Measurement failure (scorer error, eval crash): fix scorer, re-verify Gate 1, retry.
Design failure (leakage detected, split violated): ABORT. Return to prereg review.
Outcome disappointment (delta < 0.01 on all probes): NOT a failure. Expected outcome for low-headroom buckets. Log and proceed.
forbidden_during_dry_run: Changing pack composition based on dry-run results
Moving probes between fit and holdout
Promoting any child checkpoint to serving
Retraining with modified hyperparameters based on dry-run loss curves
